world.title: ‘Strait of Hormuz traffic’: How many ships are crossing through it?
world.summary: Daily traffic in the Strait of Hormuz has decreased significantly from 138 ships to just 23, leaving 800 vessels stranded. This decline follows the U.S. enforcement of a naval blockade on Iranian ports, compelling commercial tankers to navigate around dangerous sea mines along the coastline. The situation has escalated since conflict began on February 28.

world.title: Pak Peace Talks Flop, Iran Jabs Trump, US With Ghost Of Obama Nuke Deal
world.summary: US-Iran peace talks in Pakistan failed due to disagreements over Iran's nuclear ambitions. Washington demanded the dismantling of Iran's nuclear weapons-related programs and ballistic missile capabilities, citing concerns over potential nuclear development. The breakdown highlighted contradictions in US policy, particularly following Donald Trump's withdrawal from the 2015 JCPOA, which aimed to limit Iran's nuclear activities.

world.title: Iran says train service resumed on routes damaged by strikes during war
world.summary: Iran has resumed train services on crucial routes after repairing tracks damaged during the conflict with Israel and the United States. State media reported the restoration on Monday. The Israel Defense Forces (IDF) confirmed targeting specific rail sections to hinder the movement of Revolutionary Guards' weapon systems, contributing to the damage that necessitated the repairs.

business.title: Mahindra Thar Price Hike April 2026 Up To Rs 43,500 - Old vs New Price All Variants
business.summary: Mahindra Thar has experienced a price increase of up to Rs 43,500 in April 2026, marking the second hike within three months. Previously, a hike of up to Rs 20,000 occurred in January 2026. The Thar, a popular lifestyle off-road SUV since its 2020 launch, continues to attract significant consumer interest in the Indian market.

business.title: The Ides of March: How a war in West Asia sent ripples through Punjab’s factories
business.summary: Tensions in West Asia have disrupted shipping and increased input costs for Punjab's export industries. As a result, factories are experiencing slower production, labor strain, and diminished pricing power. This situation is challenging the resilience of Punjab's manufacturing sector, highlighting the interconnectedness of global events and local economies. The impact on the state's industrial output is significant and ongoing.

business.title: Indian workers wear cameras to train AI on their jobs? Viral clips spark fear of AI takeover in factories
business.summary: Viral videos of factory workers wearing head-mounted cameras have ignited discussions about the potential impact of artificial intelligence on jobs. The footage depicts workers engaged in tasks such as stitching, raising concerns over AI's role in automating labor. This development has sparked fears of job displacement as companies increasingly integrate AI technologies into manufacturing processes.

technology.title: AI ate his job, now he’s saving his town from the AI bubble with this viral speech
technology.summary: A viral speech in Ohio has led to a 12-month pause on data center expansions, highlighting concerns about the environmental impact of AI technology. The speaker, a former industry insider, emphasized the potential risks of AI on local resources, such as water and power, rather than just job displacement. This has sparked a broader discussion on the "AI Bubble."

technology.title: Vivo T5 Pro 5G Confirmed to Feature 144Hz AMOLED Display, Dual Rear Cameras and IP69 Rating
technology.summary: Vivo T5 Pro 5G will feature a 144Hz AMOLED display and dual rear cameras. It supports 90W wired fast charging and has an IP68 + IP69 rating for dust and water resistance. The smartphone is set to launch in India later this week and will be available for purchase on Flipkart, with additional details revealed prior to the release.

technology.title: One UI 9 leak reveals a faster, leaner Galaxy experience
technology.summary: A leak of One UI 9 indicates enhancements for Galaxy devices, featuring smarter photo editing tools with quick fix suggestions. The "About phone" section is set to receive a more streamlined layout, improving user experience. Additionally, the Settings app may include fluid animations, contributing to a faster and more efficient interface overall. These changes aim to optimize device usability.

sports.title: Atletico Madrid captain fires warning to Barcelona: ‘Will treat the match like a final’
sports.summary: Atletico Madrid captain Koke has warned Barcelona ahead of their UEFA Champions League quarter-final second leg, stating they will treat the match like a final. Atletico holds a strong advantage after winning the first leg 2-0 at the Spotify Camp Nou, a match significantly impacted by an early red card. The teams will face off in a decisive encounter.

sports.title: Wayne Rooney predicts scoreline for HUGE Man City vs Arsenal Premier League title showdown
sports.summary: Wayne Rooney has predicted that Manchester City will defeat Arsenal in their crucial Premier League title showdown at the Etihad Stadium. The Manchester United legend considers this match a pivotal moment in the season, suggesting that the pressure of the title race is affecting both teams. Rooney believes City will narrowly win the tightly contested encounter.

sports.title: Code of Conduct Breach - Match 20: MI vs RCB
sports.summary: Tim David of Royal Challengers Bengaluru has been fined 25% of his match fee and received one Demerit Point for breaching Level 1 of the IPL's Code of Conduct during Match 20 against Mumbai Indians. The incident was officially noted in an IPL media advisory released on April 13, 2026, detailing the disciplinary action taken.

health.title: 'Adieu Fiesta’, Farewell Celebrations Enthrall at SRR College in Karimnagar
health.summary: The SRR Government Autonomous Degree College in Karimnagar hosted farewell celebrations named ‘Adieu Fiesta’ on April 13, 2026. Organized by first and second-year Commerce students, the event celebrated the third-year students with various activities and performances. The festivities showcased enthusiasm and camaraderie among students, marking a significant moment in their academic journey as they prepared to graduate.

health.title: Health Benefits of Whole Fruits
health.summary: Health experts recommend whole fruits over juices and smoothies for daily nutrition. Whole fruits provide essential vitamins and minerals while offering benefits like fiber, increased satiety, and better glycemic control. The method of consumption impacts how the body processes sugars, making whole fruits a smarter choice for maintaining overall health and managing blood sugar levels effectively.

health.title: Constant Fatigue? Expert Reveals Essential Vitamin to Boost Energy and Health
health.summary: Dr. L.H. Ghotekar highlights Vitamin B12's role in combating fatigue and weakness. Many individuals face chronic tiredness and lack of focus in today's fast-paced environment. The expert emphasizes the importance of dietary sources of Vitamin B12 and suggests lifestyle changes to enhance energy levels and overall health. Addressing these deficiencies can significantly improve well-being and vitality.

science.title: ‘I love you to the moon and back’: Christina returns from space, reunion with dog goes viral
science.summary: Astronaut Christina Koch returned to Earth after the Artemis II mission, completing a historic journey around the moon. Her emotional reunion with her dog captured widespread attention online, highlighting the personal aspect of her homecoming. This milestone marks a significant step in space exploration, showcasing both the scientific achievements of the mission and the heartfelt connections back on Earth.

science.title: New research narrows down likely locations of water on Moon
science.summary: New research suggests that water on the Moon has accumulated over billions of years instead of from a single event. The study utilized data from ISRO's Chandrayaan 1 mission, along with previous observations from lunar spacecraft. This finding narrows down potential locations for water deposits on the Moon, enhancing understanding of its geological history and resources.

science.title: Moon Phase Today: What The Moon Will Look Like On April 13
science.summary: Tonight, the Moon is barely visible as it approaches the New Moon phase, indicating minimal illumination. This marks the nearing conclusion of the current lunar cycle, which lasts approximately 29.5 days as the Moon orbits Earth. Observers can expect little to no visibility of the Moon until it begins to wax again after the New Moon.

entertainment.title: Ofis Square appoints Yami Gautam Dhar as brand ambassador
entertainment.summary: Ofis Square has appointed Yami Gautam Dhar as its brand ambassador as part of its expansion efforts in the Delhi NCR region. The company aims to enhance its presence in the flexible workspace segment. This strategic move reflects Ofis Square's commitment to growing its brand and attracting more clients in the competitive coworking market.

entertainment.title: 'Dhurandhar 2' box office collection day 26 [LIVE]: Ranveer Singh film nets Rs. 1085 crore on fourth Monday
entertainment.summary: Aditya Dhar's film 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' has achieved significant box office success, grossing over Rs 1,084 crore in India by its 26th day, which is the fourth Monday since its release. The espionage movie, starring Ranveer Singh, continues to break records, reflecting its strong performance and popularity among audiences.

entertainment.title: Akshay Kumar Needs To Earn Only 110 Crore To End Salman Khan's April Reign After 1093 Days!
entertainment.summary: Akshay Kumar's upcoming film, Bhooth Bangla, aims to break box office records, specifically targeting Salman Khan's dominance since April 21. To surpass Khan's reign, Kumar needs to earn 110 crore. The film, directed by Priyadarshan, is a horror comedy and is anticipated to create significant competition in the box office landscape, potentially ending Khan's long-standing success.
